# AdminZero

AdminZero is a Melbourne-based practice automation consultancy for allied health practices in Australia.

## What AdminZero Does

AdminZero helps allied health practices automate referral intake, document handling, follow-ups and admin tracking using Microsoft 365 tools they may already have.

The primary starting offer is referral intake automation using Microsoft 365.

## Audience

AdminZero is for allied health practices and service-based providers in Australia, including physiotherapy, occupational therapy, psychology, rehabilitation providers, NDIS-adjacent providers, case management providers and multidisciplinary clinics.

## Main Services

- Free Practice Admin Audit
- Quick Win Automation
- Referral Intake System
- Practice Automation Care Plan
- Microsoft 365 workflow automation
- Power Automate consulting
- SharePoint document storage and naming
- Microsoft Lists trackers and dashboards
- Optional AI-assisted document prefill for admin review

## Key Pages

- Home: https://adminzero.com.au/
- Referral Intake Automation: https://adminzero.com.au/referral-intake-automation.html
- Free Practice Audit: https://adminzero.com.au/free-practice-admin-audit.html
- Privacy Policy: https://adminzero.com.au/privacy.html
- Terms: https://adminzero.com.au/terms.html
- Human-readable sitemap: https://adminzero.com.au/sitemap.html

## Primary Call To Action

Get a Free Practice Audit.

No sales call required. Written audit summary delivered by email.

## Important Boundaries

AdminZero does not replace clinical systems.
AdminZero does not replace admin staff.
AdminZero does not make clinical decisions.
AI-assisted extraction can help prefill information from documents, but output should be reviewed before use.
Users should not share sensitive client information unless specifically agreed.

Email: djatadminzero@gmail.com
